title: Text-to-World Inference Pipeline
interaction_flow: 1. User → demo(args): entry point in text2world.py
2. demo → DiffusionText2WorldGenerationPipeline.__init__(...): instantiate pipeline with guidance, num_steps, height, width, fps, num_video_frames, seed
3. __init__ → BaseWorldGenerationPipeline.__init__: load guardrail models, T5 text encoder, network model, tokenizer
4. __init__ → create_prompt_upsampler(checkpoint_dir): load prompt upsampler LLM (if enable_prompt_upsampler and not offload)
5. demo → pipeline.generate(prompt, negative_prompt, word_limit_to_skip_upsampler)
6. generate → BaseWorldGenerationPipeline._run_guardrail_on_prompt_with_offload(prompt): safety check on raw prompt → guardrail_presets.run_text_guardrail(); returns is_safe bool
7. [if unsafe] generate → return None
8. generate → _run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt_with_offload(prompt): [if enable_prompt_upsampler and word_count <= limit]
9. _run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt_with_offload → _run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt(prompt)
10. _run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt → run_chat_completion(self.prompt_upsampler, prompt): returns upsampled_prompt str
11. generate → _run_guardrail_on_prompt_with_offload(upsampled_prompt): second guardrail check on upsampled prompt
12. generate → _run_text_embedding_on_prompt_with_offload([prompt, negative_prompt])
13. _run_text_embedding_on_prompt_with_offload → _run_text_embedding_on_prompt(prompts)
14. _run_text_embedding_on_prompt → CosmosT5TextEncoder.encode(prompts): returns (embeddings: list[Tensor], masks: list[Tensor])
15. generate → _run_model_with_offload(prompt_embedding, negative_prompt_embedding)
16. _run_model_with_offload → [optional] _load_network(), _load_tokenizer()
17. _run_model_with_offload → _run_model(embedding, negative_prompt_embedding)
18. _run_model → get_video_batch(model, prompt_embedding, negative_prompt_embedding, height, width, fps, num_video_frames): returns (data_batch dict, state_shape [C,T,H,W])
19. get_video_batch → prepare_data_batch(height, width, num_frames, fps, prompt_embedding, negative_prompt_embedding): builds CUDA tensor batch
20. _run_model → generate_world_from_text(model, state_shape, is_negative_prompt, data_batch, guidance, num_steps, seed)

21. generate_world_from_text → DiffusionT2WModel.generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance, state_shape, num_steps, is_negative_prompt, seed): diffusion denoising loop; returns latent sample Tensor [B,C,T,H,W]
22. _run_model_with_offload → [optional] _offload_network()
23. _run_model_with_offload → _run_tokenizer_decoding(sample: Tensor)
24. _run_tokenizer_decoding → DiffusionT2WModel.decode(sample): VAE decode latent → pixel space; clamp/normalize to uint8 [T,H,W,C]
25. _run_model_with_offload → [optional] _offload_tokenizer()
26. generate → _run_guardrail_on_video_with_offload(video): post-generation video safety check → guardrail_presets.run_video_guardrail()
27. [if video unsafe] generate → return None
28. generate → return (video: np.ndarray[T,H,W,C] uint8, prompt: str)
29. demo → save_video(video, fps, H, W, video_save_quality=5, video_save_path): write MP4 to disk
30. demo → write prompt text file alongside video
key_relationships: BaseWorldGenerationPipeline depends_on guardrail_presets (text + video guardrail checks)

method_signatures.DiffusionText2WorldGenerationPipeline.ge: (prompt: str, negative_prompt: Optional[str], word_limit_to_skip_upsampler: Optional[int]) -> tuple[np.ndarray, str] | None
method_signatures.inference_utils.get_video_batch: (model, prompt_embedding, negative_prompt_embedding, height, width, fps, num_video_frames) -> (data_batch: dict, state_shape: list[int])
method_signatures.inference_utils.generate_world_from_text: (model: DiffusionT2WModel, state_shape: list[int], is_negative_prompt: bool, data_batch: dict, guidance: float, num_steps: int, seed: int) -> np.ndarray
method_signatures.DiffusionT2WModel.generate_samples_from_: (data_batch, guidance, state_shape, num_steps, is_negative_prompt, seed) -> Tensor

data_flow: raw text prompt → guardrail check → prompt upsampler (LLM) → upsampled prompt string
upsampled prompt → guardrail check → T5 encoder → prompt_embedding Tensor[1, 512, D]
prompt_embedding + video params → prepare_data_batch → data_batch dict with CUDA tensors
data_batch + state_shape [C,T,H,W] → DiffusionT2WModel denoising (35 steps) → latent Tensor [B,C,T,H,W]
latent → VAE decode (model.decode) → normalized pixel video → uint8 np.ndarray [T,H,W,C]
video frames → video guardrail check → save_video → .mp4 file
important_notes: Model: DiffusionT2WModel loaded via load_model_by_config from cosmos_predict1/diffusion/config/config.py
Tokenizer: Cosmos-Tokenize1-CV8x8x8-720p (8x temporal, 8x8 spatial compression), CV=causal video VAE
Prompt upsampler: Cosmos-UpsamplePrompt1-12B-Text2World LLM; skipped if prompt > word_limit_to_skip_upsampler (default 250 words)
Default generation params: guidance=7.0, num_steps=35, height=704, width=1280, fps=24, num_video_frames=121, seed=0
Offloading flags allow GPU memory management: network, tokenizer, text encoder, prompt upsampler, guardrail models can each be offloaded to CPU after use
Guardrail checks occur at 3 points: raw prompt, upsampled prompt, generated video (can be disabled with --disable_guardrail)
Multi-GPU support via Megatron context parallelism: pipeline.model.net.enable_context_parallel(process_group)
DiffusionVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline extends DiffusionText2WorldGenerationPipeline for video conditioning use-case
